title: Specific wines (Tariff notice 21)
body: "New regulation  For Information only.  New regulations were published between 12 September 2025 and 22 September 2025.  These publications are requests for cancellation of a geographical indication.  The requests for cancellation are made in accordance with Article 25(2) of Regulation (EU) 2024/1143.  Description of the goods  The new regulations published include:   Colli Aprutini (wine) — Regulation C/2025/4992  Colline Pescaresi (wine) — Regulation C/2025/5044  Valtènesi (wine) — Regulation C/2025/5016  Colline Teatine (wine) — Regulation C/2025/5049  Colline Frentane (wine) — Regulation C/2025/5050  Terre di Chieti (wine) — Regulation C/2025/5108    Classification (Combined Nomenclature (CN) code)  2204  Contact Details   Tariff Classification Customs Policy & Strategy3rd Floor14 Westfield Avenue StratfordLondonE20 1HZ   Email: tariff.classification@hmrc.gov.uk  This Tariff Notice is published for information purposes only. "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
